Descryption: Ensure that between two and four global administrator accounts are created
Recommencdation: Ensure that between two and four global admins are designated

Result: 3 cloud-only enabled Global Administrator accounts found as break-glass candidates
Expected_Value: Break Glass Account is Cloud only
Recommencdation: Ensure 'Break Glass Account' are created and configured to be 'Cloud-only' with permanently assigned 'Global Administrator' role and excluded from all 'Conditional Access' policies. Password for the account should be stored in secure vault and activity of the account should be monitored for its usage. Access to the Break Glass Account should be allowed only from selected and trusted locations (e.g. Main Office)

Descryption: Ensure that 'Privileged Identity Management' access to Office 365 roles is in use
Result: 0 eligible role assignments found in PIM
Expected_Value: Check if all of the roles in guidance have been made eligible
Recommencdation:
'Eligible Assignments' in 'Privileged Identity Management' for Office 365 should be in use. There should be defined rules for whom and what permissions can be requested to limit usage the role only for time to perform task or group of activities.

The recommendation is a part of Control ID: AAD.IM.02

Descryption: Ensure that no non-IT administrators are assigned as a Device Administrators
Result: 0 users are assigned to the Device Administrator role
Expected_Value: None of the non-IT admins are assigned as Device Administrators
Recommencdation: Review list of users that has been added as Device Administrators and remove unnecessary priviledges

Descryption: Ensure that privileged access workstations are in use for administrative tasks
Result: Manual verification required for privileged workstation usage

Descryption: Ensure Custom Role is assigned for Administering 'Resource Locks'

Descryption: Ensure that highly privileged/administrative users are separated from regular accounts
Result: 0 Global Administrator accounts also look like regular licensed user accounts
Expected_Value: All Global administrator accounts are separated from regular accounts
Recommencdation: Ensure you are identifying all high business impact accounts. Limit the number of privileged/administrative accounts in your cloud's control plane, management plane and data/workload plane
